keys.subject: Dynamic subject (tenant-admin-credentials)
keys.introTemplate: Hello{adminName}, use this password to sign in to {serviceName} Account at account portal. Manage your company subscription, billing, users, and service settings here.
keys.separatePasswordNote: This is not your Work Desk or Work App password. Those credentials were sent in a separate email.
keys.changePasswordNote: Change this password after your first sign-in.
keys._sourceNote: Extracted from tenant-admin-credentials.ts — full HTML/text managed in web-i18n locales; template code uses locale resolver.
